pages.title: {{ 2/27/2026 }}, in the morning, Coco went to school.
{{ 2/27/2026 }}, in the morning, Coco went inside school with Daddy.
{{ 2/27/2026 }}, in the afternoon, Daddy picked Coco up from school.
{{ 2/27/2026 }}, in the afternoon, Coco went home.
The end.

pages.title: {{ 2/28/2026 }}, after lunch, Coco went to Vanderbilt Park.
{{ 2/28/2026 }}, at the park, Coco played with snow.
{{ 2/28/2026 }}, after the park, Coco ate dinner.
{{ 2/28/2026 }}, at night time, Coco went to sleep.
The end.

pages.title: {{ 3/1/2026 }}, Coco saw Coach Emily
{{ 3/1/2026 }}, Coco played with Matthew, Coco had fun.
{{ 3/1/2026 }}, Coco went home, and Coco played more basketball.
{{ 3/1/2026 }}, Coco was happy.
{{ 3/1/2026 }}, Coco ate dinner. There was chicken and veggies.
